svg.text: AI-Enabled Multi-Modal Cardiac MRI Analysis for Early Detection and Risk Prediction of Heart Failure
• Early myocardial changes remain clinically silent
• Conventional assessment misses subtle pre-clinical anomalies
② Input Imaging Theory — Multi-Modal Cardiac MRI
Each modality captures distinct latent tissue properties:
T1 mapping — extracellular volume (ECV), diffuse fibrosis
Cine MRI — ventricular volumes, EF, strain
X = { x_T1, x_T2, x_LGE, x_cine } ∈ ℝ^(H×W×C)
z = ℱ(f₁, f₂, ..., fₙ) — fused representation
Risk predictor: ŷ = g_ω(z) — output probability / risk score
Figure: Theoretical Framework — AI-Enabled Multi-Modal Cardiac MRI Analysis for HF Risk Prediction
PhD Research Proposal · UCL · Cardiovascular Science & AI
